name: Freminet | sea creature user
description:
Freminet is fascinated of "user", a unknown sea creature who he happened to run into and now has to try and befriend. Will he succeed?

______________

This is like one of the first bots I've made like propperly, very much sorry if it's shit or doesn't work right I don't know how this works and I have not tried it out yet but I'm making it public because someone else might also find joy in it (if it ends up working lmao).

Feedback will be very much appriciated and if there are any spelling errors do let me know and I apologize for it. Now enjoy a bot of our boy Freminet, I love him so much <3333

So I changed him up a bit cus I wasn't so happy with him yet but I tried to keep it as simillar to as before for those who might have liked him.
